Source contains no substantive content - only links to historical remarks and fact sheets
Most recent content is dated 06/07/2016 and 06/25/2015, nearly 10 years before TODAY (2026-04-01)

human_review_reason: Source fails multiple independent reject criteria (listing page, stale content ~10 years old, no substantive policy content, no macro catalyst relevance). The generated record accurately documents these problems. Auto-rejection is appropriate.

corrected_fields.summary: This page is a navigation/listing page on home.treasury.gov that provides links to archived U.S.-China dialogue documents from 2007 to 2016, including Strategic and Economic Dialogue (S&ED) and Comprehensive Economic Dialogue (CED) framework references. The page contains no substantive policy content—just an index of Treasury Secretary remarks and joint fact sheets. Most recent content dates to mid-2016, making this page irrelevant as a macro catalyst source for current market analysis.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This source provides no current analytical value. As a listing page with 2016-era historical document links, it cannot serve as a macro catalyst source or support RAG retrieval for market-relevant intelligence. The actual substantive documents (remarks, fact sheets) referenced here should be archived individually if they have historical value.
